alerts.title: Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation and its battle with Harvey just got hotter
alerts.description: The two wildly fast-growing rivals have raised massive sums, pushed into each other's home turf, and now have dueling ad campaigns.

alerts.title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
alerts.description: OpenAI will begin rolling out its cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

alerts.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
alerts.description: The maker of Claude has received multiple preemptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

alerts.title: Scout AI Raises $100M to Build ‘AI Brain' for Autonomous Warfare
alerts.description: The fund raise comes as the White House pushes AI dominance across industries, including defense.

alerts.title: DeepSeek-V4 Could Change Global AI Model Race
alerts.description: The model maker released two versions of V4, both of which are open, cheap and use Huawei's AI chips for inference.

alerts.title: GPT-5.5 Boasts Coding Advancements, But Falls Short of Opus 4.7
alerts.description: While OpenAI has improved the model's coding and tool use ability, it still has room to improve in areas where Anthropic dominates.

alerts.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4-Cyber is More Open Than Claude Mythos
alerts.description: The model could help cybersecurity experts better prepare for attacks.

alerts.title: SoftBank reportedly weighs $100 billion valuation for new AI and robotics spinout in potential U.S. IPO
alerts.description: SoftBank Group is planning to create and list a standalone artificial intelligence and robotics company, coined "Roze" in the U.S.

alerts.title: Alphabet increases AI spending but gets rewarded for further proof that it's paying off
alerts.description: As of Wednesday's nearly record-high close of around $350, the stock was already up nearly 12% year to date.

alerts.title: Anthropic in talks with investors to raise funds at $900 billion valuation, higher than OpenAI
alerts.description: Anthropic is in talks with investors about raising cash at a valuation of $900 billion, CNBC has confirmed.

alerts.title: Netomi raises $110 million as Accenture and Adobe bet on AI for customer service
alerts.description: Netomi, the San Francisco-based startup building AI systems for enterprise customer service, said Thursday that it has raised $110 million in new funding in a round led by Accenture Ventures
